item.title: You aren’t a charity case
item.description:
You aren’t a charity case. The war crimes you commit are the things people actually fund charities to help address.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: You cannot possibly be suprised lizzy
item.description:
You cannot possibly be suprised lizzy. When u work with n*zis … they act like it.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It is not that elections don’t change anything
item.description:
It is not that elections don’t change anything. It is that the conversation being had in election elections is not whether to end the empire about how to manage it.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They profit from our outrage, but they also benefit from us ignoring their openly harmful actions so the best thing we can do is...
item.description:
They profit from our outrage, but they also benefit from us ignoring their openly harmful actions so the best thing we can do is capitalise on the outrage that is produced to permanently dismiss them they are opportunist to the worst extent. #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: There seems to be a lot of confusion about why I have such distain for the “America first not Israel first” people and it’s beca...
item.description:
There seems to be a lot of confusion about why I have such distain for the “America first not Israel first” people and it’s because they fundamentally misunderstand both what Israel is and what America is. America has never been the people that live on this land. It has been the project of erasing the peopel that used to live on this land. Israel has never been about its own propaganda mythology of why it exists it has been about extending the power of the West.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
